usage: Login page left hero independent hologram shield emblem with alpha-masked dark background. Content consistency is prioritized over exact brightness/opacity; removes hard rectangular crop background while preserving the shield, rings, data rain and pedestal glow.

source.alpha_processing: OpenCV B/G/R brightness and cyan-score threshold with Gaussian feathering to remove the rectangular crop background before compositing.
source.policy: independent hero emblem/icon crop only; target PNG remains evidence-only and is not served from web public assets

format: bitmap screenshot icon with alpha channel
integration: web/ui/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx uses this alpha screenshot icon for the visual-target hologram shield; surrounding page background and login panel are separate scoped resources or code-rendered controls according to the current gate.
